title: Authorizing non-authenticated users to use keys in the Android KeyStore is security-sensitive
description: Keys stored in the Android KeyStore should only be accessible to authenticated users. Allowing non-authenticated users to use these keys can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data and compromise application security.
recommendation: Always require user authentication before allowing access to keys in the Android KeyStore. Use the appropriate authentication flags when generating or retrieving keys.
impact: Unauthorized users may gain access to cryptographic keys, leading to data breaches or unauthorized actions.

checks.message: Always require user authentication before allowing access to keys in the Android KeyStore. Use the appropriate authentication flags when generating or retrieving keys.
